Enumeration# JSRelationCondition

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 2.0+

```
enum JSRelationCondition
```

## [Overview](/documentation/javascriptcore/jsrelationcondition#overview)

A constant identifying the type of JavaScript relation condition.
